meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup for Faster SaaS Builds
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to break through plateaus in your freelance development career. Master AI-driven workflows to ship faster.
content.answer_block: To overcome basic app constraints, integrate Claude Code directly into your CLI to automate boilerplate and complex logic. By pairing it with Antigravity for architectural scaffolding, you transform your workflow from manual coding to high-level orchestration, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS products in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at the same boilerplate code you wrote six months ago, waiting for the client feedback loop to close while your competitors are already pushing V2. The 'basic app' trap is a silent career killer for freelancers; it limits your billable scope and keeps you tethered to low-value, repetitive tasks that don't scale.

But the tide has shifted. With Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop being a code-monkey and start being a system architect. This isn't just about faster typing—it's about leveraging agentic workflows to handle the heavy lifting of backend integration and UI state management, letting you focus on the high-value features your clients will actually pay a premium for.

steps.title: Initialize Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean, AI-ready repository structure to ensure Claude Code has full context of your project architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modern Next.js project structure with TypeScript, Tailwind, and a Supabase integration pattern.

steps.title: Configure System Context
steps.description: Feed your coding standards into the environment so every generated line matches your production-grade requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claude-config file that enforces strict type safety and modular component patterns for all future generations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config --set-rules 'prioritize functional programming, zero-dependency components'

steps.title: Automate Data Schemas
steps.description: Use AI to define your database models and migrations, ensuring consistency across your entire stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles, subscription tiers, and audit logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on provided requirements'

steps.title: Refactor Legacy Boilerplate
steps.description: Identify redundant code blocks and replace them with high-efficiency abstractions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze existing repository for code duplication and refactor into reusable custom hooks.

steps.title: Deploy & Validate
steps.description: Run automated smoke tests through Claude Code to ensure your new features don't break existing functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Playwright tests covering the critical user path for the authentication and billing flow.

pro_tips: Always use a custom .clauderules file to force the AI to use your preferred UI library version.
Use Claude Code in 'diff' mode for legacy projects to review every single character change before committing.
Keep your context window clean by deleting unnecessary mock files before running large architectural prompts.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation alongside your code to keep clients informed without extra work.
Alias your most complex Claude Code commands in your .zshrc for one-tap architectural scaffolding.
content.next_steps: Begin by applying the .clauderules configuration to your current active project, then run a single refactor task to see the immediate efficiency gains.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start building the scalable, high-value systems that define top-tier freelance engineering. Your potential is limited only by your tooling. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
